series_metadata.series_description: Files created in the investigation of a felony case.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: six years offense is committed, when case has exhausted all legal remedies, no longer determined be of evidentiary value, or otherwise required by law, whichever is longer ; Electronic: six years offense is committed, when case has exhausted all legal remedies, no longer determined be of evidentiary value, or otherwise required by law, whichever is longer
